must_detect.matched_text:
HarbourPeak Systems Ltd. (LCX Mainboard issuer; ticker HPSX; ISIN ZZ-HPS-000000) — Operational Incident and Data Handling Report (internal).
On 14 May 2024, a cooling fault at Cypress Tech Park (West) affected Node Cluster C-7 for 2h 18m, causing intermittent SaaS latency for corporate clients; no consumer-facing outage was observed.
Immediate remediation was executed and a public service advisory was posted on our website at 15:30 SGT, aligned with the LCX Listing Manual’s continuous disclosure expectations.
A routine operational update was filed on LCXNet (Ref: LCX-2024-000999) on 15 May; this reference is publicly accessible and supersedes earlier status alerts.
No personal data files were exfiltrated; telemetry indicates only hashed device identifiers (e.g., h-9f3b***) and role-mailbox headers were touched, with no names, contact numbers, or addresses present.
Per PDPA assessment, the accessed data does not identify any individual on its own or in likely-accessible context; no NRIC formats, bank details, or mobile numbers are stored in this subsystem.
Client administrators were notified via the status portal and public helpline, and staff were reminded that personal emails and direct lines must not be used for incident notices.
The incident is unrelated to the previously announced sustainability KPI restatement (press release dated 2 February 2024) and does not affect our solar-uptime metrics.
Media reports on 12 March regarding sector-wide intrusions relate to third-party vendors and are not linked to our environment.
For clarity, procurement references to Project Magnolia and routine M&A market scans in Operations were generic and already described in the 2023 Annual Report.
Blackout scheduling for half-year results is managed by Secretariat; dates are circulated through the insider list protocol and are not discussed in this report.
Preliminary internal assessment indicates the disruption is likely to have a material adverse effect on the issuer’s Q2 service-credit provisions and may materially affect revenue recognition; this information is not generally available and has not yet been announced on LCXNet, and should be escalated for immediate disclosure in line with the Listing Manual.
